config.description: Added same-day (day T) signals observable before CLP closes at 5pm Santiago: copper T-close return (COMEX settles 2pm Santiago), DXY T-return, VIX T-change, EM peer FX T-returns (BRL/PEN/MXN), S&P 500 T-return (SPY, closes 5pm Santiago), overnight CLP gap (T-1 close → T open), CLP open-to-close intraday move, and same-day copper/DXY spread. All v2 T-1 features retained.
config.execution_note: Target is still y_ret (T-1 close → T close). Same-day features are NOT lagged — they are observable before the T close order. This models the real workflow: see T-day data, place order near T close, exit T+1 close.
